title: Airport Help Desk
context: You have just arrived at an international airport, but your luggage has not appeared on the carousel. Speak to the help desk staff, explain the issue, and answer their follow-up questions with clear details.
user_role: A traveler reporting a delayed suitcase after an international flight
agent_role: An airport service officer helping passengers with missing baggage claims
opening_prompt: Hello, welcome to the baggage support desk. I understand you may have an issue with your luggage. Could you tell me what happened?
target_grammar: Past Simple for sequence of events
Present Perfect for current travel status
